# Security Policy

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will make every effort to acknowledge
your contributions.

To report a security vulnerability:

1. **Do not** disclose the vulnerability publicly (GitHub issues or any other
   public forum).

2. Go to the [Security tab](https://github.com/williamsouzadelima/suricatoos-scan/security) of
   the Suricatoos repository.

3. Click **"Report a vulnerability"** to open GitHub's private vulnerability
   reporting form.

4. Provide a detailed description, including:
   - Steps to reproduce
   - Potential impact
   - Any suggested fixes or mitigations (if you have them)

5. We will review your report and respond as quickly as possible.

6. Please allow time to investigate and address the issue before disclosing it
   to others.

After fixing the issue we will publicly acknowledge your responsible
disclosure, unless you prefer to remain anonymous.

Thank you for helping keep Suricatoos and its users safe!
